data.body: PORTING COMPLETE. All 11 leaf-write commands ported to rebar._commands behind REBAR_LEAF_WRITES, switch-wired at dispatcher + library/MCP, each dual-run parity-green (bash AND python, byte-identical): comment, set-file-impact, set-verify-commands, tag, untag, archive, create, edit, link, unlink, revert. Foundation: ticket-append-event.sh seam (I5 preserved), rebar._switch (single-source switch parse). Validation: every command's bash suite green both impls (comment 13, file-impact 22, verify 18, tag 9, archive suites 9/6/15/13, create 56, edit 48, link 66/4/23/2, revert via id-resolution 41 + bridge-e2e 23); interfaces tier 240 green incl. 32 new parity tests; reducer revert tests green. Default STAYS bash. Commits: 671be954 (foundation+comment/fi/vc), tag, archive, 2f54256f (create), edit, link, unlink, revert. The four AC for porting are met. Remaining Tier B = bored-nape-kin (flip default->python, one-release dogfood soak, then retire switch+bash+suites) — release-gated, NOT doable in-session without a real soak. Keeping this umbrella in_progress until that lands.
